hooks.prompt: [engine-hook] First, read .claude/agents/plan-readiness-checker/AGENT.md to learn the full evaluation procedure. Then read the most recent .md file in .claude/plans/ and follow that procedure exactly. Use Glob/Grep/Read to verify file paths and resolve ambiguities before flagging them. Respond: {"ok": true} if ready, {"ok": false, "reason": "<specific issues>"} if not.
